query:
SELECT 
  t.entityId,
  t.targetLanguage,
  t.fieldName,
  LENGTH(t.translatedText) as textLength,
  t.isVerified,
  t.translatedBy,
  t.createdAt
FROM translations t
WHERE t.entityType = 'tour'
ORDER BY t.entityId, t.targetLanguage, t.fieldName;
